commands.review_summary:
The branch filters unreadable or provider-unserializable runtime tools before agent tool normalization, adds safe quarantine diagnostics, and adds focused regression tests for unreadable tool rows/descriptors and bundled MCP allowlists.

PR surface: Source +236, Tests +351. Total +587 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main normalizes active tools before the safe quarantine point, while the PR tests simulate unreadable rows/descriptors and unsupported schemas. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow automated repair remains; maintainers need to accept the compatibility semantics and coordinate the related split PRs before merge.

target.title: fix(agents): quarantine invalid runtime tool schemas
target.body:
## Summary

- Pruned this PR to runtime tool-schema quarantine only; doctor diagnostics and compaction hardening are deferred to follow-up PRs instead of being bundled here.
- Safely reads runtime tool arrays, tool rows, and tool descriptor fields before provider normalization or model-session setup.
- Quarantines unsupported or unreadable tool schemas, logs a diagnostic for the bad tool/plugin when metadata is readable, and preserves healthy tools so the assistant turn can continue.

## Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.test-support.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.ts`
- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts --reporter=verbose` passed 2 Vitest shards / 68 tests after rebasing on current `origin/main`.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` reported no accepted/actionable findings.
- GitHub PR checks on `e8ec77906a8f` were successful after the PR-body refresh.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: a bad active runtime tool schema, unreadable tool descriptor, or unreadable bundled-tool row should not crash assistant setup before content.

Real environment tested: local sparse `gwt` worktree using the repo Vitest router; GitHub Actions CI for the pushed PR branch.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts --reporter=verbose`.

Evidence after fix: focused tests cover unsupported schemas, provider-repairable schemas, unreadable descriptors, unreadable tool rows, explicit allowlists, bundled MCP allowlists, and quarantine logging without re-reading hostile rows.

Observed result after fix: healthy tools remain available while malformed tools are filtered before provider normalization/model-session setup.

What was not tested: no separate local Testbox/Crabbox run beyond GitHub PR checks. Doctor validation is intentionally handled by follow-up PR #88493.
target.author: vincentkoc
